prompt: Run the StockHive agent system through the orchestrator-native path in the existing persistent stockhive-orchestrator session. Read agent-system/runtime/orchestrator-run-input.json as the canonical runtime input. Continue using the same orchestrator session across scheduled runs so state, notes, and continuity stay with the long-lived orchestrator. First obtain a deterministic daily random sample of exactly 10 usable Nasdaq-100 tickers through the data-fetcher agent using agent-system/scripts/pick_random10.py. Then run technical, fundamental, and sentiment analysis through their specialist agents in parallel. Aggregate the structured outputs, run agent-system/scripts/decision_engine.py, and publish through the telegram-publisher agent.
